verses.text: Nineveh khuapi aw, nang hong kisim ta a, nang hong sugawp dingpa hong tungta hi. Na kan uhah pang un la, lampi vil un. Kithawi un la, galdo dingin kiging un
(Israel mite, a galte' sukgawp ma, a nidang ngeina bangun Topa in a omsakkik ding a kipan ahi hi
A galkapte in lum san hong keng uh a, puan zong a san mah hong silh uh hi. A sim dingin hong kipan uh a, a sakol leengte uh khuaphia bang a, a sakolte uh hong koplen' uh hi
Sakol leengte kongzing lakah kilehsuk kilehto uh a, lamkabom khempeuh nawkin leeng kawikawi uh hi. Meikuang bangin kikhawh uh a, khuaphia bangin leeng uh hi
Galkapmangte kikaikhawm a, a galkapte uh thu pia uh hi. Amaute, kan phung lam kiden'na uh a, a lum uh tawh kidal uh hi
Tui luan'na gei-ah a om kulhkongpite kisatkham a, kumpi innsungah patauhna om hi
Kumpinu kimanin kipuakhia a, a nasemte thumin kap uh a, dahin dip hum uh hi
Tuibem kitam panin tui a kikhawhkhia bangin, Nineveh khuapi panin mite a taikhia uh hi. “Khawl un, khawl un,” a kicih hangin khat beek nungheilo uh hi
Ngunte la un! Khamte la un! Khuasungah sum manpha bei cih om theilo a, van manpha zong bei cih om theilo hi
Nineveh khuapi kisusia a, kinusiacipin gamkhing suak hi. Launa lungsim tawh kidimin khukte ling kelkel a, mi khempeuh lunggimin a mai-ah si tenglo hi
Humpinelkai note an a kivakna mun, humpinelkai leh a note lungmuanga a omna mun, humpinelkaite' kua tawh a kibang koi-ah omta ahi hiam
Humpinelkai in sa manin a zi leh a tate-a' dingin a sa balnensak a, a kua sung khempeuh sa tawh kidimsak ngei hi.

Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Kei pen note' gal ka hi a, na sakol leengte uh ka haltum ding hi. Na humpinelkai note uh namsau in vatmai ding a, midangte' na na suh teng uh ka susiamang khin ding hi. Na tangmite uh' awging koi mahah kiza nawnlo ding hi,”ci hi.
